title: Making an Appointment 约时间
scene: Tom想约朋友周六一起踢足球。

lines.en: Hey, Kevin! Are you free this Saturday?
lines.zh: 嘿，凯文！你这周六有空吗？

lines.en: Let me check. Yes, I'm free in the afternoon.
lines.zh: 我看看。是的，我下午有空。

lines.en: Great! Do you want to play football with us?
lines.zh: 太好了！你想和我们一起踢足球吗？

lines.en: I'd love to! What time shall we meet?
How about three o'clock at the school playground?
lines.zh: 三点钟在学校操场怎么样？

lines.en: That works for me. How many people are coming?
We have six people so far. You make seven!
lines.zh: 目前有六个人。加上你就是七个！

lines.en: Cool! Should I bring my own ball?
lines.zh: 太酷了！我需要带自己的球吗？

lines.en: Yes, please. And bring some water too.
lines.zh: 是的，请带上。也带些水来。

lines.en: No problem! I'll be there on time. See you Saturday!
lines.zh: 没问题！我会准时到的。周六见！
